caption: The video appears to be an educational or informational presentation discussing the concept of "preservation" in the context of housing and community development. The slide shown is titled "What does 'preserve' mean," and it clarifies that preservation involves the protection of personal or real property from injury, harm, or destruction, emphasizing that this is distinct from rehabilitation. The text on the slide references Section 5 of the Community Preservation Act (CPA), which outlines the use of CPA funds for the rehabilitation or restoration of open space and community housing that is acquired or created as provided by the act. The right side of the screen displays a document from the Commonwealth of Massachusetts Department of Housing & Community Development, dated May 30, 2013, addressing local housing authorities regarding the utilization of CPA funds for the preservation of existing public housing units. The presenter, visible in a small window in the top right corner, likely elaborates on these points, providing further context and explanation.
